Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**

with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px
with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below
[GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]
[GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]
[GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic).
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

**Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget).
Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
the callout sits on the page/section background (usually White `#ffffff`).
**Corner radius (mandatory, never change):** box `border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px;` in `TL TR BR BL` order
Inset the blue box from the left by **`W/2` = 40px**
Inset the blue box from the left by **`W/2` = 40px**
a **White `#ffffff` rounded square** holding the line icon
The white badge **mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale**, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`
**Drop shadow (mandatory):** the white icon badge **must carry a subtle drop shadow** so it lifts off the blue box — e.g. `box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18);`
holding the line icon (Brand Blue stroke)
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
all multi-column layouts collapse to single column
all multi-column layouts collapse to single column
practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).
practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking.

Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave
always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
always preserve the layered, translucent quality

Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast

Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**
with a thin Gold rule beneath.

Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
